texto: You see? That's the point. It's all a big guess. They hope, they pray, they cook and garden and get a better job to pay the mortgage and read dirty books to keep bedtime interesting, but they don't know. There are no guarantees. Sometimes you just stop loving someone. You just stop.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Tania Kindersley que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “You see? That's the point. It's all a big guess. They hope, they pray, they cook and garden and g…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, love-hurts, point, com foco em reflexao.
